steps.title: Identify what 'different orders' requires
steps.content: The goal calls for emphasizing the different orders — meaning showing multiple distinct orders of classification, not just one.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: Choice B presents two different orders with a contrasting structure: Hymenoptera (sawflies, wasps, bees, ants) while Coleoptera (beetles, weevils), which directly shows their distinction. Choices A, C, and D each mention only a single order or shift focus away from the classification question. That matches choice B — B is correct.
